body: PR #482 merged. Tested at 768px and 1024px breakpoints in Chrome and Safari - cards no longer overlap. Moving to Done.
Pulled the dashboard on a tablet during break - cards holding their grid now at 768px. Signing off as charge nurse - safe to close for the ER floor.
Still seeing long drug names cut off (Hydroxyzine Pamoate Metoprolol Succinate). Need tooltip on hover or a min column width.
Picked this up. Will land tooltip on hover + ellipsis pattern next sprint.
PR #514 merged 2026-05-06. Password error now wraps above the submit button on iOS Safari and Android Chrome at 360px.
Looks good in QA staging on my end. Moving to Done.
Confirmed on Android Chrome too. Closing.
Marking Wont Fix - design team says zebra striping is on the v2 roadmap not this sprint.
Reproduced on night shift - timestamps unreadable on the Recent Activity card under low-light ER lighting. Tagging Critical.
Token swap landing in next theme refresh. Tracking for sprint 5.
EHR vendor confirms the indication field is in the v3 payload. Waiting on integration ticket BKD-118 before we can wire it through.
